title: Ph.D. Research Assistantship — Water Resources / Hydrology
description: The Water Footprint Lab is recruiting a Ph.D. student to work on global and regional water footprint assessment, water scarcity indicators, or agricultural water productivity. Background in civil/environmental engineering, hydrology, GIS, or a related quantitative field is preferred. Funding covers tuition and stipend.

title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
description: An opportunity for undergraduate students at UA interested in water resources, data analysis, or remote sensing to gain hands-on research experience. This cycle has closed — check back for the next call.
